name_cn:
Genuine Grade, High Version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall Collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from white calfskin, it features oversized quilted stitching. The spacious internal compartment can hold various daily items. It features a slender leather drawstring closure for secure storage, and a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-button clasp on the adjustable sides to elevate the style. The top leather handle comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm
